name: Plague of Illusions
descriptionTemplate: Increase a chosen Awakener's Aliemus by [Arg1], and inflict [Arg2] {Poison} on all enemies. For each 1% of HP the target is missing, trigger 1% of their {Poison}, up to 50%.
lore:
The Void is a plague brought by the Hidden Truth, erasing all colors and painting everything gray.
Do not look directly into those mad Eyes; be careful, she may have already infected you.
